description_long: This is a small potted cactus with a rounded, green, pad-like main body covered in evenly spaced, short yellowish spines. Three distinct upright pads grow from the main body, two of which are taller and more prominent, while a smaller one emerges from the side. The cactus is planted in a reddish-brown terracotta pot filled with coarse, dark brown soil. The pot has a simple, unadorned cylindrical shape with a slightly flared rim. The overall appearance is that of a healthy, well-maintained cactus suitable for decorative use in urban environments.
description: A small, round, green cactus with upright pads and yellow spines, set in a plain terracotta pot filled with coarse soil.
description_view_0: The cactus displays its rounded main pad with three upright pads, two tall and one smaller, all covered in yellow spines.
description_view_1: The cactus is seen from the side, showing the narrow profile of the main pad and the vertical alignment of the upright pads.
description_view_2: The main pad is fully visible with all three upright pads clearly seen, highlighting the cactus's symmetrical shape.
description_view_3: A side angle reveals the cactus's pads in a staggered arrangement, emphasizing the texture and spines.
